name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-40
title: test-tdd-step.py terminal-state test t8 misnamed and message says wrong assertion
description: test-tdd-step.py t8 (line 171-178) fixture state is 'deprecated', transitions to 'spec' with --force. ok message reads 'deprecated is terminal (no exit even with --force)' — but the variable is named t8 and the message says no EXIT which is misleading; the assertion is that no TRANSITION is allowed. Reword to 'deprecated has no allowed forward or backward transitions (even with --force)'. Also clarify that it tests the special-case in tdd-step.py line 340-342.
